shared_required.name: Balm
shared_required.notes: Required library for Waystones. Put this exact jar into mods/shared/.

shared_required.name: Waystones
shared_required.notes: Teleport/waypoint mod used by the CripCraft hub and zone. Put this exact jar into mods/shared/.

client_only_optional.name: Jade
client_only_optional.notes: Optional but recommended client tooltip helper. Put this jar into mods/client-only/ and later into your Minecraft mods folder.

client_only_optional.name: Just Enough Items (JEI)
client_only_optional.notes: Optional but recommended recipe browser. Put this jar into mods/client-only/ and later into your Minecraft mods folder.
